registers.name: MCR
registers.description: CAN master control register - controls initialization, sleep, and operational modes

bitfields.name: INRQ
bitfields.description: Initialization request - writing 1 requests entry into initialization mode

bitfields.name: SLEEP
bitfields.description: Sleep mode request - writing 1 requests sleep mode

bitfields.name: NART
bitfields.description: No automatic retransmission - 1 to disable auto-retransmit

bitfields.name: ABOM
bitfields.description: Automatic bus-off recovery mode - 1 enables automatic recovery from bus-off

bitfields.name: RESET
bitfields.description: Software reset - write 1 to reset CAN peripheral

bitfields.name: DBF
bitfields.description: Debug freeze - 1 to freeze CAN during debug

registers.name: MSR
registers.description: CAN master status register - read-only status flags

bitfields.name: INAK
bitfields.description: Initialization mode acknowledge - 1 when in initialization mode

bitfields.name: SLAK
bitfields.description: Sleep mode acknowledge - 1 when in sleep mode

bitfields.name: ERRI
bitfields.description: Error interrupt flag - cleared by writing 1

bitfields.name: WKUI
bitfields.description: Wakeup interrupt flag - cleared by writing 1

bitfields.name: SLAKI
bitfields.description: Sleep interrupt flag - cleared by writing 1

registers.name: TSR
registers.description: Transmit status register - manages 3 transmit mailboxes

bitfields.name: RQCP0
bitfields.description: Request complete for mailbox 0 - cleared by writing 1

bitfields.name: ABRQ0
bitfields.description: Abort request for mailbox 0 - write 1 to abort transmission

bitfields.name: CODE
bitfields.description: Mailbox code - next empty mailbox number (0-2)

bitfields.name: FMP0
bitfields.description: FIFO 0 message pending - number of messages (0-3)

bitfields.name: FULL0
bitfields.description: FIFO 0 full flag - cleared by writing 1

bitfields.name: FOVR0
bitfields.description: FIFO 0 overrun flag - cleared by writing 1

bitfields.name: RFOM0
bitfields.description: Release FIFO 0 output mailbox - write 1 to release

registers.name: ESR
registers.description: Error status register - error counters and flags

bitfields.name: EWGF
bitfields.description: Error warning flag - REC or TEC > 96

bitfields.name: EPVF
bitfields.description: Error passive flag - REC or TEC > 127

bitfields.name: LEC
bitfields.description: Last error code: 0=no error, 1=stuff error, 2=form error, 3=ack error, 4=bit recessive, 5=bit dominant, 6=CRC error, 7=software set

registers.name: BTR
registers.description: Bit timing register - only writable in initialization mode

bitfields.name: SJW
bitfields.description: Resynchronization jump width (actual = SJW+1, range 1-4 Tq)

bitfields.name: SILM
bitfields.description: Silent mode - 1 to enable (listens only, no transmission)

registers.name: FMR
registers.description: Filter master register - manages filter initialization

bitfields.name: FINIT
bitfields.description: Filter initialization mode - 1 to enter filter init mode

registers.name: FM1R
registers.description: Filter mode register - selects mask or list mode for each filter

bitfields.name: FBMx
bitfields.description: Filter x mode - 0=mask mode, 1=list mode (one bit per filter 0-13)

registers.name: FS1R
registers.description: Filter scale register - selects 16-bit or 32-bit filter width

bitfields.name: FSCx
bitfields.description: Filter x scale - 0=dual 16-bit, 1=single 32-bit (one bit per filter)

registers.name: FFA1R
registers.description: Filter FIFO assignment register - assigns filter to FIFO 0 or 1

bitfields.name: FACTx
bitfields.description: Filter x activation - 0=inactive, 1=active (one bit per filter)

configuration_strategies.name: Basic Initialization
configuration_strategies.description: Standard CAN initialization with APB1 clock, default pins, normal operation
steps: Enable AFIO clock (RCC_APB2ENR) if using remapped pins
Configure GPIO pins CAN_TX and CAN_RX
Configure BTR register with baud rate parameters
constraints: BTR register is writable only in initialization mode
At least one filter must be activated for reception
GPIO pins must be configured before enabling CAN

configuration_strategies.name: Loopback Mode (Debugging)
configuration_strategies.description: CAN in loopback mode for self-testing without external hardware
additional_steps: Transmitted frames are automatically received in same device

configuration_strategies.name: Silent Mode (Listen-Only)
configuration_strategies.description: CAN in silent mode - receives only, never transmits
additional_steps: Device monitors bus but does not participate in arbitration

configuration_strategies.name: Automatic Bus-Off Recovery
configuration_strategies.description: Enable automatic recovery from bus-off state
additional_steps: CAN will automatically recover from bus-off after 128 consecutive recessive bits

configuration_strategies.name: GPIO Pin Remapping
configuration_strategies.description: Use alternate GPIO pins instead of default PA11/PA12

cross_field_constraints.description: BTR register is writable only when in initialization mode
cross_field_constraints.violation_effect: BTR writes are ignored outside initialization mode

cross_field_constraints.description: CAN is ready to operate when not in initialization or sleep mode
cross_field_constraints.violation_effect: CAN is not ready to transmit/receive

cross_field_constraints.expr: FMR.FINIT = 1 implies writable(FM1R || FS1R || FFA1R || FA1R)
cross_field_constraints.description: Filter registers are writable only when FMR.FINIT = 1
At least one filter must be activated for reception to work
With ABOM enabled, CAN automatically recovers from bus-off
cross_field_constraints.violation_effect: Register write silently fails or produces undefined behavior

cross_field_constraints.description: Transmission is possible when mailbox is empty (TME = 1)
cross_field_constraints.violation_effect: Register write silently fails or produces undefined behavior
Register write silently fails or produces undefined behavior

cross_field_constraints.description: Last error code of 0 means no error occurred since last read
cross_field_constraints.violation_effect: Register write silently fails or produces undefined behavior

atomic_sequences.name: Enter Initialization Mode
atomic_sequences.description: Safe sequence to enter initialization mode with timeout
preconditions: Must not already be in initialization mode

atomic_sequences.name: Exit Initialization Mode
atomic_sequences.description: Safe sequence to exit initialization mode
postconditions: CAN is in normal operating mode

errors.name: Stuff Error
errors.description: More than 5 consecutive bits of same level detected

errors.name: Form Error
errors.description: Invalid bit sequence or frame format

errors.name: Bit Recessive Error
errors.description: Node attempted to send dominant bit but line is recessive

errors.name: Bit Dominant Error
errors.description: Node attempted to send recessive bit but line is dominant

errors.name: CRC Error
errors.description: Received CRC does not match calculated CRC

functional_model.data_flow: External CAN bus → RX FIFO (3 slots) → Application → TX FIFO (3 mailboxes) → CAN bus
functional_model.control_flow: Initialization mode → Normal operation / Sleep mode / Bus-off recovery
functional_model.interrupt_model: Level-triggered on flag bits: TMEIE, FMPIE0/1, FFIE0/1, FOVIE0/1, EWGIE, EPVIE, BOFIE, LECIE, ERRIE, WKUIE, SLKIE
key_features: Support for standard (11-bit) and extended (29-bit) identifiers
Error handling with automatic counter management
Loopback and silent modes for testing

pending_reviews.item: Receive mailbox register offsets (RIxR, RDTxR, RDLxR, RDHxR)
pending_reviews.reason: Documentation indicates offsets but implementation details for FIFO mailbox access vary by SDK
14 filter banks exist but specific mask/list mode examples not fully documented in reference

notes: CAN1 is the only CAN peripheral in STM32F103C8T6
All timing parameters assume APB1 clock = 36 MHz
Standard baud rate table covers 50kbps to 1Mbps

operation_modes.name: Normal
operation_modes.description: CAN bus active, transmit and receive enabled
